nasb.text: So Jehoiachin changed his prison clothes, and had his meals in the king’s presence regularly all the days of his life.

esv.text: So Jehoiachin put off his prison garments. And every day of his life he dined regularly at the king’s table,

cnv.text: 又換下他的囚衣，賜他終生常在王面前吃飯。

ccb.text: 约雅斤脱去了囚服，终生与巴比伦王一起吃饭。
